description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow that triggers at midnight every day. Run a matrix job across multiple operating systems (Windows 2025, Windows 2022, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15, 14, and 13), configurations (Debug and RelWithDebInfo), and Vulkan versions (1.4.313.0 and 1.3.296.0). For each job, install dependencies, check out the repository, set up C++ and Vulkan, restore incremental build artifacts, generate a build system with CMake, build and install NovelRT, and upload the build artifacts.
